insert-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Pages from One PDF into Another
insert-pages-into-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a range of pages from a source PDF file into a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.Insert method with file paths.

insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.title: Insert Page Range into PDF Using Streams
insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.description: Demonstrates how to insert a specific range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF by working with file streams using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-selected-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Selected Pages from One PDF into Another
insert-selected-pages-into-pdf.description: Shows how to insert specific pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a defined position using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

insert-specific-pages-into-pdf-using-str.title: Insert Specific Pages into PDF Using Streams
insert-specific-pages-into-pdf-using-str.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from a source PDF stream into a destination PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor stream overload.

insert-pages-at-beginning-of-pdf.title: Insert Pages from One PDF at the Beginning of Another
insert-pages-at-beginning-of-pdf.description: Shows how to prepend all pages of a source PDF to a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.Insert method.

insert-pages-into-pdf-at-middle.title: Insert Pages into PDF at Middle Position
insert-pages-into-pdf-at-middle.description: Demonstrates how to insert all pages from a source PDF into the middle of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

append-pages-to-pdf.title: Append Pages from One PDF to Another
append-pages-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor to append all pages of a source PDF to the end of a destination PDF and save the result.

insert-pages-into-pdf-using-memory-strea.title: Insert Pages from One PDF into Another Using Memory Streams
insert-pages-into-pdf-using-memory-strea.description: Demonstrates inserting selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF entirely in memory with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and MemoryStream.

batch-insert-page-ranges.title: Batch Insert Page Ranges from Multiple PDFs
batch-insert-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to insert specific page ranges from several source PDFs into a single destination PDF in a loop using Aspose.Pdf's Facade API.

insert-multiple-pdf-pages.title: Insert Multiple PDF Pages from Various Sources
insert-multiple-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert specific pages from several source PDFs into a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor in C#.

load-pdf-document-from-file.title: Load PDF Document from File Path
load-pdf-document-from-file.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from a specified path using Aspose.Pdf's Document class, including a file‑existence check.

load-pdf-and-get-page-count.title: Load PDF Document and Get Page Count
load-pdf-and-get-page-count.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file from a file path using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and retrieving the total number of pages.

insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Specific Pages into PDF and Save Output
insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.description: Shows how to insert selected pages from one PDF into another PDF at a given position and write the resulting document to a new file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

save-pdf-to-memorystream-using-pdfviewer.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream using PdfViewer
save-pdf-to-memorystream-using-pdfviewer.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and saving it directly to a MemoryStream, avoiding any disk I/O.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF document from the first page up to a specified end page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the resulting front part to a new file.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page__v2.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page__v2.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF from page 1 up to a given end page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with in‑memory streams.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets Using PdfFileEditor
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into multiple bulk page ranges using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor and save each bulk as a separate file.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets__v2.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets Using Streams
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets__v2.description: Shows how to split a PDF supplied as a Stream into multiple page‑range bulks and return each bulk as a ready‑to‑read MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from Start Page to End
split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF beginning at a specified page through the end of the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the output file.

split-pdf-from-start-to-end.title: Split PDF from Start Page to End Using Streams
split-pdf-from-start-to-end.description: Shows how to extract pages from a specified start page to the end of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and return the result as a MemoryStream.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save them to a specified output folder.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs Using Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages with streams and save each MemoryStream to a file.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files Using MemoryStream
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual page streams with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save each stream as a separate PDF file.

merge-multiple-pdfs-into-single-document.title: Merge Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
merge-multiple-pdfs-into-single-document.description: Shows how to concatenate several PDF files into one PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Document class with the Merge method, including file existence validation and error handling.

extract-first-n-pages-from-pdf.title: Extract First N Pages from PDF using SplitFromFirst
extract-first-n-pages-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst to extract pages 1 through a specified end page and save them as a new PDF.

extract-front-pages-pdf-in-memory.title: Extract Front Pages of PDF In-Memory with SplitFromFirst
extract-front-pages-pdf-in-memory.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, then use PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst to extract pages from the first page up to a specified end page without writing intermediate files.

split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Multiple Page Ranges Using SplitToBulks
split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate documents based on specified page ranges using the PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks method.

split-pdf-into-multiple-bulks.title: Split PDF into Multiple Bulk Streams
split-pdf-into-multiple-bulks.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into defined page ranges using PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks and handle the resulting MemoryStream objects.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from a Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd to extract pages starting from a given page through the end of a PDF and save the result as a new file.

split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end__v2.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End Using Streams
split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end__v2.description: Shows how to split a PDF document from a given start page to the end of the file using Aspose.Pdf's SplitToEnd method with in‑memory streams.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages Using PdfFileEditor
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages__v2.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-individual-pages__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages to split a PDF into separate one‑page MemoryStream objects and save each page as an individual PDF file.

delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.title: Delete Pages 2-5 from PDF Using File‑Path Overload
delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.description: Demonstrates how to remove pages 2 through 5 from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Delete with the file‑path overload and save the result.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF using PdfFileEditor
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF by supplying input and output streams to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.title: Remove First and Last Pages from PDF
remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the first and last pages of a PDF by obtaining the page count and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Delete with an integer array.

batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages from PDFs
batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a folder of PDF files and delete specified pages from each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

delete-pdf-pages-validate-count.title: Delete PDF Pages and Validate Count Reduction
delete-pdf-pages-validate-count.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then verify that the total page count has decreased.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs-pdffileeditor.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs Using PdfFileEditor
concatenate-multiple-pdfs-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates how to merge three PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with the three‑argument Concatenate method.

merge-multiple-pdfs-into-single-document.title: Merge Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
merge-multiple-pdfs-into-single-document.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate several PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and write the merged result to an output stream.

concatenate-two-pdfs.title: Concatenate Two PDFs into a Single PDF
concatenate-two-pdfs.description: Shows how to merge two existing PDF files into a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor’s Concatenate method.

concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-to-file.title: Concatenate PDFs from Memory Streams to File
concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-to-file.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF documents held in memory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and write the combined result directly to a file without intermediate storage.

batch-concatenate-pdfs-in-folder.title: Batch Concatenate PDFs in a Folder
batch-concatenate-pdfs-in-folder.description: Shows how to merge all PDF files from a given directory into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade.

measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.title: Measure PDF Concatenation Performance Using Streams
measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.description: Demonstrates concatenating 50 small PDF files with PdfFileEditor stream overloads while measuring the execution time.

compare-pdf-concatenation-path-vs-stream.title: Compare PDF Concatenation Path vs Stream Overloads
compare-pdf-concatenation-path-vs-stream.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's file‑path and stream overloads while measuring memory consumption during the operation.

create-pdf-booklet.title: Create PDF Booklet with Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document using default settings.

create-booklet-pdf-a5.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom A5 Page Size
create-booklet-pdf-a5.description: Shows how to generate a booklet from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a custom A5 page size.

create-booklet-pdf-left-right-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF with Specified Left and Right Pages
create-booklet-pdf-left-right-pages.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF by defining separate left‑hand (odd) and right‑hand (even) page sequences using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size Using Streams
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to generate a booklet from an existing PDF via streams and then apply a custom page dimension (e.g., A5) to each page of the resulting document.

create-pdf-booklets.title: Create Booklet PDFs from Multiple Files
create-pdf-booklets.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF for each source PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save each result in its own output directory.

delete-pages-and-create-booklet.title: Delete Pages and Create Booklet from PDF
delete-pages-and-create-booklet.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF and then generate a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.title: Delete Pages and Concatenate PDFs with PdfFileEditor
delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF and then merge the edited file with another PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

delete-specific-pages-pdf-error-handling.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF with Error Handling
delete-specific-pages-pdf-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and includes checks for missing input files and exception handling.

batch-booklet-creation-audit-log.title: Batch Booklet Creation with Audit Logging
batch-booklet-creation-audit-log.description: Demonstrates creating a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor while logging each step of the batch process to a text file for audit purposes.

custom-booklet-left-right-pages.title: Create Custom Booklet with Specified Left and Right Pages
custom-booklet-left-right-pages.description: Demonstrates adding visible page numbers, using PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet with custom left/right page arrays, and extracting the resulting page order to verify the booklet layout.

resize-pdf-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF to Letter Size Using PdfFileEditor
resize-pdf-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to resize all pages of a PDF to US Letter dimensions (8.5" x 11") using the PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents overload that works with file paths.

resize-pdf-pages-to-8-5x11-inches.title: Resize PDF Pages to 8.5x11 Inches Using Stream Overload
resize-pdf-pages-to-8-5x11-inches.description: Shows how to set all pages of a PDF to standard Letter size (8.5×11 inches) by using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents with stream parameters.

batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A4
batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, resize each page to A4 using Aspose.Pdf, and save the results to a target directory.

measure-pdf-resize-performance.title: Measure PDF Resize Performance Using File Path vs Stream
measure-pdf-resize-performance.description: Shows how to shrink a large PDF and compare the execution time of PdfPageEditor when using the file‑path overload versus the stream overload.

create-2up-pdf-layout.title: Create 2‑up PDF Layout Using MakeNup
create-2up-pdf-layout.description: Shows how to generate a 2‑up (two pages per sheet) PDF by calling Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeNUp and saving the result to a new file.

create-4up-pdf-with-pdffileeditor.title: Create 4‑up PDF with PdfFileEditor and Streams
create-4up-pdf-with-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates applying a 4‑up (2 × 2) layout to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeNUp stream overload and handling the result in a MemoryStream.

batch-create-3x2-nup-pdfs.title: Batch Create 3‑by‑2 N‑up PDFs
batch-create-3x2-nup-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process all PDF files in a folder and generate N‑up versions with three columns and two rows per sheet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.title: Create N‑up Layout and Convert to Booklet PDF
create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.description: Shows how to arrange multiple PDF pages on a single sheet using MakeNUp and then reorder the pages into a printable booklet with MakeBooklet.

delete-pages-resize-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Content
delete-pages-resize-pdf.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then resize the remaining pages' contents before saving.

remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Remove Specified Pages from Multiple PDFs in Parallel
remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to delete given page numbers from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-using-streams.title: Concatenate PDFs Using Stream Overloads
concatenate-pdfs-using-streams.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document by opening each file as a stream and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Concatenate. The example also shows proper stream disposal.

pdffileeditor-delete-out-of-range-test.title: Test Delete Throws Exception for Out‑Of‑Range Page Numbers
pdffileeditor-delete-out-of-range-test.description: Demonstrates unit tests that verify PdfFileEditor.Delete throws an exception and TryDelete returns false when the specified page numbers exceed the document length.

create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.title: Create Booklet PDF from Stream
create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to convert an input PDF stream into a booklet PDF returned as a MemoryStream.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-order.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Order
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-order.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF by specifying left and right page sequences using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size__v2.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size__v2.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF with a custom 5.5×8.5‑inch page size using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade.

validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.title: Validate PDF Concatenation Preserves Page Order
validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.description: Shows how to concatenate two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and verify that the merged document keeps the original page order by comparing page counts and page dimensions.

delete-pages-3-4-from-pdfs.title: Delete Pages 3 and 4 from PDFs
delete-pages-3-4-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove pages 3 and 4 from each PDF in a source directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the modified files to a destination folder.

merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.title: Merge Multiple PDFs with Logging using Aspose.PdfFileEditor
merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate several PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor while logging the input and output file names.

create-booklet-left-odd-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF with Left Pages as Odd Numbers
create-booklet-left-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor to generate a booklet PDF, assigning odd‑numbered pages to the left side and even‑numbered pages to the right side.

resize-pdf-to-1024x768-using-stream.title: Resize PDF to 1024x768 Using Stream Overload
resize-pdf-to-1024x768-using-stream.description: Demonstrates resizing all pages of a PDF to 1024 × 768 points with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor via the stream overload, then verifies visual fidelity by rendering the first page to an image and checking its dimensions.

batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages and Merge PDFs
batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specified pages from several PDF files and then concatenate the cleaned PDFs into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into a Single File
concatenate-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to merge several PDF documents into one output file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

merge-pdf-streams-no-temp-files.title: Merge PDF Streams without Temporary Files
merge-pdf-streams-no-temp-files.description: Shows how to combine multiple PDF streams (such as network streams) into a single PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor, avoiding any intermediate files.

test-makebooklet-throws-exception-null-p.title: Test MakeBooklet Throws Exception for Null PageSize
test-makebooklet-throws-exception-null-p.description: Demonstrates how to verify that PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet throws an exception when the pageSize argument is null.

delete-pdf-pages-and-get-size.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF and Get Resulting Size
delete-pdf-pages-and-get-size.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then obtain the size of the resulting document.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-page.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Page Separator
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-page.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF documents into one file while automatically inserting a blank page between each source PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-resize-pdfs-a5-booklet.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A5 and Create Booklets
batch-resize-pdfs-a5-booklet.description: Shows how to resize every page of PDF files to A5 dimensions and then generate a booklet for each resized document using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pages-create-two-up-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Create 2‑up PDF Layout
delete-pages-create-two-up-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages from a PDF stream and then arrange the remaining pages in a 2‑up (two pages per sheet) layout, writing the result to an output stream.

create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-r.title: Create Booklet PDF with Specified Page Ranges
create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-r.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document by providing left‑ and right‑page sequences using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.title: Concatenate PDFs While Preserving Metadata
concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and retain the original document metadata (author, title, dates, etc.) in the resulting PDF.

create-booklet-pdf-delete-resize.title: Create Booklet PDF by Deleting Pages and Resizing Content
create-booklet-pdf-delete-resize.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages from a PDF stream, resize the remaining pages, and convert the result into a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-sizes.title: Create Booklet PDFs with Custom Page Sizes
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-sizes.description: Generates sample PDFs, then uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet to produce booklet versions with various custom page sizes and verifies the results.

concatenate-pdfs-in-zip-archive.title: Concatenate PDFs Inside a Zip Archive
concatenate-pdfs-in-zip-archive.description: Demonstrates how to read PDF files from a ZIP archive, merge them using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and write the combined PDF back into the same archive.

delete-pdf-pages-cli.title: Delete PDF Pages via Command Line
delete-pdf-pages-cli.description: Shows how to build a command‑line tool that removes specified pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and writes the result to a new file.

parallel-delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Parallel Deletion of Pages from Multiple PDFs
parallel-delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to delete specified pages from a collection of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor. The example processes each file in parallel and saves the results to an output folder.

rotate-pdf-landscape-create-booklet.title: Rotate PDF to Landscape and Create Booklet
rotate-pdf-landscape-create-booklet.description: The example rotates all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation using PdfPageEditor and then generates a booklet from the rotated document with PdfFileEditor.

test-concatenate-throws-exception-empty-.title: Test Concatenate Throws Exception for Empty Input Streams
test-concatenate-throws-exception-empty-.description: Demonstrates a unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Concatenate raises an exception when the input stream array is empty.

merge-pdfs-from-streams.title: Merge Multiple PDFs Using Aspose.Pdf
merge-pdfs-from-streams.description: Demonstrates loading PDF files into memory streams, concatenating them with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, and saving the merged result to a file.

log-pages-removed-during-pdf-delete.title: Log Pages Removed During PDF Delete Operation
log-pages-removed-during-pdf-delete.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and log the number of pages actually removed for audit trails.

resize-combine-pdf-booklet.title: Resize PDFs and Combine into a Booklet
resize-combine-pdf-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑resize PDF files to 1024×768, concatenate them, and convert the result into a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdfs.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDFs
delete-specific-pages-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from one or more PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the cleaned versions with a suffix.

insert-blank-separator-when-merging-pdfs.title: Insert Blank Separator Page When Merging PDFs
insert-blank-separator-when-merging-pdfs.description: Shows how to create a temporary blank PDF page and insert it as a separator between multiple PDFs during concatenation using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-and-merge-pdfs.title: Resize PDFs and Merge into a Single Document
resize-and-merge-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to resize each page of multiple PDF files to a specific size using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents, then concatenate the resized PDFs into one document with Aspose.Pdf.Document.

delete-pages-resize-pdf__v2.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Content
delete-pages-resize-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages from a PDF, resize the remaining page contents, and return the result as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.title: Concatenate PDFs and Add Page Numbers
concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document and automatically insert page numbers on each page using Aspose.Pdf facades.

create-booklet-pdf-using-left-pages-firs.title: Create Booklet PDF Using Left Pages of First Half
create-booklet-pdf-using-left-pages-firs.description: This example shows how to generate a booklet PDF by selecting the even (left) pages from the first half of a source PDF and pairing them with the corresponding odd (right) pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-from-right-pages.title: Create Booklet from Right‑Hand Pages of a PDF
create-booklet-from-right-pages.description: Demonstrates extracting the odd-numbered pages from the second half of a PDF and then generating a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.
